top.title: At least 100 dead in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, official says
top.summary: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared the outbreak an international emergency.

top.title: American contracted Ebola in Democratic Republic of Congo, CDC says
top.summary: A medical group says an American doctor tested positive after being exposed while treating patients.

top.title: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
top.summary: The US president says he is holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".

top.title: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
top.summary: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.

top.title: Musk loses OpenAI court battle after jury finds he waited too long to sue
top.summary: Jurors spent weeks hearing about Musk's claim that Altman had "stolen a charity."

top.title: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
top.summary: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.

title.#text: PlayStation exclusives aren’t coming to PC anymore
Musk v. Altman proved that AI is led by the wrong people
Walmart launches new budget-friendly Android tablets starting at $97
